notes: When forced to run the Windows version under Proton rather than execute the native GNU/Linux binary, Legend of Grimlock runs flawlessly &–if you're an ultrawide user–better than the native version. With the native version, the game can only render 16:9 (or thinner) resolutions, so even though my monitor is an ultrawide 3440×1440 it can only render a maximum resolution of 2560×1440. With the Windows version under Proton, it can render a full 3440×1440 perfectly as it would on real Windows. Thanks Proton!
title: Legend of Grimrock
